title: dot-agents canonical plugin bundle manifest
description: Repo-local JSON Schema for ~/.agents/plugins/<scope>/<name>/PLUGIN.yaml. All five platforms have first-class plugin support. kind=native is for OpenCode runtime JS/TS plugins; kind=package is for Cursor/Claude/Codex/Copilot installable bundles. platforms lists the platform IDs this bundle targets. Resources are shared canonical components; files/ holds native assets (OpenCode); platforms/{id}/ holds platform-specific passthrough files (e.g. plugin.json). Runtime validation in the CLI is intentionally out of scope for this slice.

kind.description: native = runtime JS/TS plugin (OpenCode); package = installable bundle with plugin.json manifest (Cursor/Claude/Codex/Copilot)

name.description: Stable logical plugin id; should match the bundle directory name under plugins/<scope>/

platforms.description: Platform IDs this plugin targets. Emission paths: opencode → .opencode/plugins/ (implemented); cursor → .cursor-plugin/ (pending); claude → .claude-plugin/ (pending); codex → .codex-plugin/ (pending); copilot → plugin.json/.github/plugin/ (pending)

version.description: Optional semantic version string; surfaced in marketplace.json listings and platform manifest generation

display_name.description: Optional human-friendly display name; used in marketplace listings when present

description.description: Human-readable summary of the plugin bundle

authors.description: Optional list of author names; first entry is used as the primary author in generated manifests

homepage.description: Optional URL for the plugin homepage or documentation

resources.description: Optional canonical shared resources bundled with this plugin. Each field lists relative paths under resources/{component}/ within the bundle directory.

marketplace.description: Optional marketplace registration hints used when generating marketplace.json files

repo.description: Git repository URL for marketplace listing

dependencies.description: Optional platform-native dependency declarations (e.g. npm packages for OpenCode runtime plugins)

platform_overrides.description: Platform-specific render hints. Keep narrow — only use for values that cannot be represented in the shared fields. Allowed keys: claude, cursor, codex, copilot, opencode.

platformOverride.description: Arbitrary platform-native metadata. Common keys: path (output path override), file (filename override), category (marketplace category), marketplace_name (marketplace display name).
